title: pteris longifolia var. bahamensis
intro: Pteris longifolia var. bahamensis, also known as Bahamian Brake Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bahamian Brake Fern include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting overall well-being. Bahamian Brake Fern can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form as a dietary supplement.
